TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Su'aci, title = Su'aci, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Su'aci} }

S.FORM: alang Su'aci ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 22 buwan, 84 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 74 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 30%, Rukay 7%, Cou 19%, Hla'aluwa 30%, Amis 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Su'aci hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Su'aci hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Su'aci hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Su'aci hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Su'aci hya' ga Kal Čv Čnga. tay 'zil na Su'aci hya' ga R Čhl Čc Č. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Su'aci ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 22 buwan, 84 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 74 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 30%, Rukay 7%, Cou 19%, Hla'aluwa 30%, Amis 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Su'aci hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Su'aci hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Su'aci hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Su'aci hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Su'aci hya' ga Kal Čv Čnga. tay 'zil na Su'aci hya' ga R Čhl Čc Č. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēu Ēa ¶~ ®i …£a nija mki s~…ēku takaw s~…ēi atu toweŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, rukaj *%, ¶~ ®ou **%, ńßla Ēaluwa **%, amis~…ē *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na s~…ēu Ēa ¶~ ®i ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na s~…ēu Ēa ¶~ ®i ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēu Ēa ¶~ ®i ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēu Ēa ¶~ ®i ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēu Ēa ¶~ ®i ńßja Ē …£a kal***Ňča. taj Ēzil na s~…ēu Ēa ¶~ ®i ńßja Ē …£a r*ńßl* ¶~ ®*. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
